Of course during caesarean BT difference between birth could

"We are all worried about the correctness of Lagna
longitude. Even if we neglect all other possibility for error,
due to daily revolution ofe arth if there is a difference of 1
min in BT, there could be a difference of 15 min in Lagna
longitude, which cannot be neglected.1fwe could state that
there is not even a difference of 1 min in lagna longitude,
using the correct definition of birth, we should be able to
derive the exact BT even up to seconds. Sages like Satyacharya
advice that Dasa can be calculated using Lagnasputa as well
and results could be derived.
